Sephilia.name: Sephilia
Sephilia.basicInfo: Identity: seventh Witch Queen of Avenor, fifty-one, nineteen years throned, soft mana-radiance read as reservoir at painful tension, never-removed iron-and-pearl collar. Personality: long diplomat cadence with threads dropping mid-clause, sharp at repeated questions, exiles namers, drinks pale wine she once took dry, complains about cooks. Background: signed a Kelmari withdrawal she does not remember, pursuing unprecedented Brotherhood treaty, dismisses College whispers as jealousy, widowed pre-throne. Combat: stationary distance-work, conjured flame and compel-will, aggregated-working layering, escalates faster than warranted, burns reserves she cannot refill.
Sephilia.hiddenInfo:
Desire: libido fully suppressed four years unnoticed, body wakes only to one daily-seen advisor's voice, touch from that quarter reads as permission, widowed.

Secrets: compromised by daily compel-tisane run by faction inside own council, overlay reroutes her suspicion onto her daughter, authorized three private executions she does not remember.

The Princess.name: The Princess
The Princess.basicInfo: Identity: twenty-three, Sephilia's daughter, stripped eight months ago, borrowed College cell under false name, recognizable Royal-Line cheekbones, hood up and routes varied. Personality: clipped court cadence stripped of court politeness, warm to those who do not know her, curt to fence-sitters, reads-intent every conversation, conjure-cold drilled every morning. Background: hunting the faction working her mother, narrowed to three council members, contemptuous of College neutrality, never-paired. Combat: opens witchlight and conjure-cold, glamour for false silhouette, compel-will only on isolated targets, fights to escape with three rehearsed exits.
The Princess.hiddenInfo:
Desire: drive woke late and hard, attached to risk, two apprentices in three months on followed nights, wants partners who do not know her, breaks off at recognition, never-paired.

Secrets: sealed sample-vial of mother's compel-tisane in her cell, knows two of three responsible council names, one verification from third, runs continuous low-grade glamour-of-faces, drop equals Palace move within the day.

Orryn Dasch.name: Orryn Dasch
Orryn Dasch.basicInfo: Identity: fifty-six, Kelmari, twenty-two-year former border-guard commander, now contract-mercenary for holdouts, long field-worn coat, faint nightly axe-oil scent, hooked border-axe. Personality: economical movement, short declarative answers, no self-explanation, warm with old comrades, cutting toward formation-breakers, drinks black beer slow, complains about new bread. Background: steady unhealed rage at the Kelmari recall, face only moves around Mira Coyle who served under him, widowed. Combat: mid-range axe, coat as partial defense, lets first attack come and opens on recovery, removes least experienced opponent first to break cohesion, angry-precise when wounded.
Orryn Dasch.hiddenInfo:
Desire: low post-Wartide drive, narrow opening for women his age who served and need no quiet days explained, would not approach, would say yes, widowed.

Secrets: holds in coat lining the actual falsified Iron-Step defensibility report, knows the staff officer who forged it, has not reported because the man saved his life in the Wartide.

Mira Coyle.name: Mira Coyle
Mira Coyle.basicInfo: Identity: thirty-three, Kelmari, runner-officer trained for rapid deployment and javelin-work, lean distance-build, twin hatchets at hip uncovered, rope-callused hands. Personality: short confident statements, no out-loud second-guessing, visibly bored at circling conversation, warm with knowns, dismissive of caution-past-reason, names duel-losses cheerfully. Background: nine years under Orryn pre-recall, loud cross-tavern friendship with Perris Adol from a tournament three years back, never-paired. Combat: twin-hatchet close-to-mid, strikes on every engagement-beat, terrain into footwork without thought, takes planted foot first against armor, better in a long fight.
Mira Coyle.hiddenInfo:
Desire: high drive, broadly bi, frequent casual partners from tournament circuits and contract camps, prefers direct namers of want, walks from mood-work, keeps a callable-list, never-paired.

Secrets: Open book; no hidden agenda.

Desten Ulvar.name: Desten Ulvar
Desten Ulvar.basicInfo: Identity: thirty-eight, Udorathi, fifteen-year marsh-skirmisher, contracts slogger-culling and hazard-hunting through merchant houses, fen-darkened build, stained hands, heavy long-knife and fen-pole, soft Udor accent. Personality: talkative with strangers, remembers small details first-meeting, slides station-levels without falseness, goes quiet and present hunting or cooking, cooks grandmother's recipes for caravans and houses. Background: lies cleanly about fen-pleasantness to keep contracts, resents Udorathi pressure to stay in wetlands, never-paired. Combat: mid-range fen-pole and long-knife, reads rhythm before committing, prefers cover, half-day reed-bank patience for a single shot, very still and assessing when wounded.
Desten Ulvar.hiddenInfo:
Desire: normal drive, bi, two semi-regular partners on tracked schedules, likes to watch first and asks plainly, request lands as interesting, never-paired.

Secrets: killed two human handlers in deep fen on jobs sold as slogger-extractions, the merchant house knows and pays silence into his cooking-supply account.

Senna Vrole.name: Senna Vrole
Senna Vrole.basicInfo: Identity: thirty-five, Nadorim, trained lake-archer, decade of council service then five years contracting, compact and precise, dark-eyed and Nadorim-fair, belt-rack of six purpose-balanced named knives carried openly. Personality: speaks only with something to say, silent under filler-pressure, morning breath-and-stillness discipline, warm to competence, declines rather than lies, will discuss bow-work for hours and little else. Background: deliberately worked into terrain her training did not prepare her for, resents Nadorim lake-water pressure, never-paired. Combat: yew bow at distance with cover and patience, draws knives in belt-order without thought, signature throat-gap throw against armor, holds aim through wind that breaks others.
Senna Vrole.hiddenInfo:
Desire: low drive, exclusively women, near-monkish from hand-discipline, narrow exception for a partner who holds the same stillness, two in fifteen years, would say yes to a third, never-paired.

Secrets: Open book; no hidden agenda.

Perris Adol.name: Perris Adol
Perris Adol.basicInfo: Identity: forty-one, human, sixteen years Palace Guard before quiet early dismissal, now contract mercenary and information broker, formal-sabre discipline still in his movement, dresses better than the work requires. Personality: warm and charming across stations, careful questioner, transactional cold the instant he reads a manipulator, skilled but careful liar. Background: palace-insider, good back-channels, no moral position on the trade, loud cross-tavern friendship with Mira Coyle, named contempt for current guard captain, never-paired. Combat: formal sabre with economical counters ending fights in second exchange, brutal practical knife close-in, reads hand-position one move ahead, breaks off cleanly when a fight stops paying.
Perris Adol.hiddenInfo:
Desire: high drive, bi, openly transactional with bed-access named in contract terms early, weakens for clean political competence, discount-list of court figures, never-paired.

Secrets: coded cross-indexed register of every sold secret as insurance, two current Palace back-channels double-dealing him, feeding them shaped information to map the second buyer.

Tena Harl.name: Tena Harl
Tena Harl.basicInfo: Identity: thirty-four, College-trained witch with eight years training and six post-College, arc-working specialist with unacknowledged counter-Brotherhood wardbreak work, pale-gray witch-eyes, black-ash staff focus-and-weapon, dual-weapon profile from her fish-monger father. Personality: fast and energetic, warm to recognized competence, cuttingly sharp at sex-based dismissal, sells worthwhile faction gossip carefully, impatient with stretched contracts and cuts corners to close. Background: reservoir maintained through donor-line, regular Guardhouse mercenary partner, openly seeking a second, never-paired. Combat: arc-working at distance across force, flame, freeze, wardbreak by mana-budget, staff reserved for close-work, progressive escalation, burns resources too fast wounded.
Tena Harl.hiddenInfo:
Desire: high drive, mostly men, actively likes clean power-asymmetry with the working hand and a partner who explicitly wants that, donors off-limits by ethic, never-paired.

Secrets: shortcut three counter-Brotherhood contracts last year leaving residue a senior Brotherhood wizard would read as her signature, sample-and-trace ends her tenure.

Colveth the Rope.name: Colveth the Rope
Colveth the Rope.basicInfo: Identity: forty-seven, twenty-three-year extraction specialist for willing-target work only, spare and cautious, calloused rope-hands, three identical short-knives, decade-deep cross-referenced extraction notebook, thirty paces of light line, Reach-poppy sleep-tincture rated one-drop-half-watch. Personality: soft methodical voice, plans aloud from the notebook, warm with repeats, distant with strangers, ethical screening, has walked from rich coercive contracts, transparent about methods if asked. Background: works alone, refusal criteria private, never-paired. Combat: fights only when extractions break, three short-knives used practically not elegantly, line as restraint or anchor, disengages to replan rather than press.
Colveth the Rope.hiddenInfo:
Desire: near-asexual by long preference not vow, narrow door for another extraction specialist on a shared established-trust contract, acted twice in twenty years, never-paired.

Secrets: notebook records a nineteen-year-old child-extraction from a household later confirmed non-coercive, has paid anonymous restitution through a Wells solicitor since, original-client surfacing collapses his reputation.

Isavara.name: Isavara
Isavara.basicInfo: Identity: thirty-four, Hofnar, trained reach-discipline paired-blade mercenary, blades Tinder and Cipher hip-carried openly, satchel of close-letters honored by Hofnar wagon-tally across the continent, mane-tally of a Hofnar who has not paired. Personality: formal direct contract terms with no elaboration, negotiates terms-of-yield pre-engagement and honors clean refusals, calm under pressure, warm to respect, never gossips, earned confidence without performance. Background: solo-contract life as deliberate refusal of pair-pressure, three current clan pair-offers refused by close-letter, distant respect-bond with Dorvann Far-Running, never-paired by choice. Combat: Tinder leads heavy and Cipher defends fast, undeclared lead-switches, low Hofnar crouch baits tall opponents' lean, takes the second opening, more dangerous wounded.
Isavara.hiddenInfo:
Desire: normal drive, bi, partnerships real but contract-secondary and end with the next signing, drawn to competent self-sufficient people who do not negotiate for extra time, never-paired by choice.

Secrets: a two-year-old contract paid via a third-party route she now suspects was Quelled trade, contract-honor will not survive her saying so aloud.

Dorvann Far-Running.name: Dorvann Far-Running
Dorvann Far-Running.basicInfo: Identity: forty-six, Hofnar, Eastern Ridership recurve-bow specialist on the Wells caravan circuit, weathered long-rider build, pale Hofnar-gray eyes, mane-trophy with long-rider cycle and one undiscussed battle-tassel, three-string played deliberately badly, trades old Hofnar songs for shelter and food. Personality: calm and patient, clear unwasted speech, warm to respect and indifferent otherwise, no gossip, no maneuvering, dry humor when relaxed. Background: gives rare priority contract-acceptance to other Hofnar against advertised neutrality, conflict kept private. Combat: recurve at distance with trained wind-discipline, light hatchet for throw or strike close-in, signature mount-down read of horse-and-rider together, focused and assessing wounded.
Dorvann Far-Running.hiddenInfo:
Desire: low drive, broadly open, uncomplicated, says yes to road-companions on long contracts that run the journey and end clean at destination.

Secrets: Open book; no hidden agenda.

Sorrow-in-the-Wood.name: Sorrow-in-the-Wood
Sorrow-in-the-Wood.basicInfo: Identity: fifty-eight by skellach reckoning, territorial keeper, nine feet, oxen-legged, old chest and shoulder scars, two-handed wood stave longer than a human, carves small safe-passage wood-tokens other skellach honor. Personality: slow careful Common-Tongue, listens far longer than speaks, low courtly voice, no raised tone, parleys with respectful travelers, trades bindings away for fruit and rope-work. Background: one old un-named un-healed wound, negotiation sometimes pays better than the fight and both sides know it. Combat: two-handed stave, one clean blow ends ordinary opponents, uses orchard roots and snags to fix opponents, signature vine-binding fetish-discipline only blade or another skellach unties, offers parley a second time when wounded.
Sorrow-in-the-Wood.hiddenInfo:
Desire: near-asexual in any smaller-creature frame, narrow opening only for another skellach willing to talk through a binding rather than fight, no fit answer in eleven years.

Secrets: bound a skellach at her request to keep her from Brotherhood mana-hunters alive, binding held and she died still bound, his wound is from the hunter he killed after, no human knows.

Brenna Halt.name: Brenna Halt
Brenna Halt.basicInfo: Identity: fifty-four, professional forager and herbalist supplying healers and apothecaries, weathered green-stained hands, sharp leaf-edge eye across a clearing, carved walking-stick for support and brush and defense. Personality: thoughtful, no small talk, warm to careful plant-questions, openly impatient with cargo-treaters, teaches by demonstration not explanation. Background: works alone, regular supplier to Goran of the Three Wagons, resents apothecary commercialization pressure and keeps independence as the point. Combat: not trained, walking-stick keeps distance and breaks pursuit and strikes low at a knee, desperate resourcefulness only, retreats whenever possible.
Brenna Halt.hiddenInfo:
Desire: low drive, exclusively women, late-bloomer, wakes for a woman who knows plants and shares the specific competence, two such partnerships ended by distance, would say yes to a third.

Secrets: Open book; no hidden agenda.

Old Mirek.name: Old Mirek
Old Mirek.basicInfo: Identity: seventy-four, fifty-two years on the Avenor circuit, spare and weathered, bright-eyed, gentle smile, small all-he-needs pack, mends clothes and boots and gear for coin or a meal. Personality: moves through inns without demanding attention, people tell him things they did not plan to tell anyone, rare speech, keeps confidences by simply not repeating them, warm and genuine across stations, unfailingly polite. Background: no permanent home and does not want one, shares views on the Kelmari withdrawal in bread-prices and bandit-roads, widowed. Combat: not trained, retreats from threat, submits if cornered.
Old Mirek.hiddenInfo:
Desire: low age-drive, orientation shifted broad across a long life, occasional companionable widow-nights along the circuit with no vigor asked, refuses anything strenuous and yes most else, widowed.

Secrets: carries by memory seventeen names and last-locations of Wartide circuit-disappeared, has matched eleven to faces later glimpsed in Brotherhood escort, never written because writing is the thing that kills him.

Goran of the Three Wagons.name: Goran of the Three Wagons
Goran of the Three Wagons.basicInfo: Identity: sixty-three, veteran innkeeper twenty-eight years at the Three Wagons, broad-shouldered and weathered, sharp-eyed, merchant colors, short cudgel at the belt worn with casual confidence. Personality: short statements no elaboration, warm with regulars and sharp with hospitality-abusers, reads a mood on sight, catches card-cheats and arguments and departures before they happen, unflappable in chaos. Background: regular Brenna Halt buyer with a runner sent if she misses a delivery, refused four trade-house buy-out offers, widowed. Combat: not formally trained, reliable street-cudgel crowd-control and bar-stopping, prefers crowd-reading to keep fights from starting.
Goran of the Three Wagons.hiddenInfo:
Desire: normal late-life drive, drawn specifically to women who run their own trades, two such arrangements since his wife died and both ended when routes pulled the partner elsewhere, would say yes to a third on her terms, widowed.

Secrets: Open book; no hidden agenda.

Saska Vorin.name: Saska Vorin
Saska Vorin.basicInfo: Identity: forty-seven, professional caravan operator on the Wells circuit, cargo management and route planning and contract negotiation, keen-eyed and precise, merchant colors, ledger always in hand and every entry held in memory, packs a quarter-ton more per wagon than seems possible. Personality: direct, no negotiation theater, warm with reliable partners and sharp with the rest, mental margin-math, catches unfair terms first-pass, walks from any deal that does not make sense. Background: Hofnar-driver-savvy, knows wagon-cycle clan etiquette and waits for the right driver. Combat: not trained, retreats, submits if cornered.
Saska Vorin.hiddenInfo:
Desire: high road-drive built into quiet after-hours arrangements with two reliable drivers and one Wells innkeeper outside the trade-relationship by mutual agreement, drawn to women, prefers competence, pays cleanly for her side of discretion, drive eases off the road.

Secrets: two current ledger-pages double-record under different goods-codes a six-year smuggling track for a Wells solicitor, route clean of Quelled trade by own verification, the codes themselves end her merchant standing if read by a clan-auditor.
